transcriptSnippet: ...flows they and their peers actually want, and readers can pick and choose those experiences freely. I believe this creates the conditions for a more equitable, more responsive, and less exploitative attention economy. This isn't just about the long tail of the Reddit moderator slash Wikipedia editor class of the internet, though. One of the best examples of how we can use this technology to start unwinding some of the harm social media has wrought upon journalism was during the New York City mayoral election. We worked with WNYC to build a feed that contained vetted information sourced from newsrooms...
